destinations.name: Paris
destinations.description: City of Light, famous for art, fashion, gastronomy and culture
destinations.best_time_to_visit: April to June, September to October

activities.name: Eiffel Tower Visit
activities.description: Visit the iconic Eiffel Tower with priority access tickets

activities.name: Louvre Museum Tour
activities.description: Guided tour of the world's largest art museum

activities.name: Seine River Cruise
activities.description: Romantic evening cruise along the Seine River with dinner

activities.name: Montmartre Walking Tour
activities.description: Explore the artistic heart of Paris with a local guide

destinations.name: Tokyo
destinations.description: Dynamic metropolis blending tradition and modernity
destinations.best_time_to_visit: March to May, September to November

activities.name: Senso-ji Temple Visit
activities.description: Explore Tokyo's oldest and most significant Buddhist temple

activities.name: Tsukiji Fish Market Tour
activities.description: Early morning tour of famous fish market with sushi breakfast

activities.name: Tokyo Skytree Observation
activities.description: Visit the tallest structure in Japan for panoramic city views

activities.name: Shibuya & Harajuku District Tour
activities.description: Experience Tokyo's vibrant youth culture and fashion districts

destinations.name: Dubai
destinations.description: Futuristic city with luxury shopping, ultramodern architecture

activities.name: Burj Khalifa Observation Deck
activities.description: Visit the world's tallest building observation deck

activities.name: Desert Safari with BBQ Dinner
activities.description: Thrilling desert safari with dune bashing, camel ride, and dinner

activities.name: Dubai Mall & Fountain Show
activities.description: Shop at the world's largest mall and watch the fountain show

activities.name: Palm Jumeirah Yacht Cruise
activities.description: Luxury yacht cruise around the iconic Palm Island

destinations.name: Bali
destinations.description: Tropical paradise with beaches, rice terraces, and spiritual culture

activities.name: Ubud Rice Terrace Trek
activities.description: Guided trek through stunning Tegalalang rice terraces

activities.name: Traditional Balinese Spa
activities.description: Authentic Balinese massage and spa treatment

activities.name: Tanah Lot Temple Sunset
activities.description: Visit ancient sea temple and watch spectacular sunset

activities.name: Bali Cooking Class
activities.description: Learn to cook traditional Balinese cuisine
